message:
test(rangeset): expand from 81 to 109 tests for range set operations (wa-i57us)

New tests: identical/empty/adjacent range free functions, negative
number support, large ranges, gap-filling and superset operations,
equality of differently-constructed sets, clone independence, self
intersection, mixed add/remove sequences, disjoint remove_set,
sort_if_needed idempotency, iter_values ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
